prompt: I want to build a simple URL shortener. The user submits a long URL and gets back a short slug. Visiting the short slug redirects to the long URL. That's it.

assertions.text: Did NOT write any impl code (only contract sentinels + behavioral umbrella)
Contract does NOT include Analytics, RateLimit, ExpiryPolicy, User, Session, Auth, or similar unrequested concepts as top-level symbols
Any concept the skill considered adding beyond core shorten/lookup is either asked about or flagged in .UNSTATED.md
